summary: Frontend-only testing of Grocor landing page. All 13 sections + footer render correctly, all 5 WhatsApp CTAs have valid hrefs to wa.me/5511999999999 with proper text messages and target=_blank/rel=noopener, fixed nav stays visible on scroll, floating WhatsApp CTA visible both desktop/mobile, all required Portuguese copy present, no broken images, no console/page errors. Responsive at 1920px and 375px.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: WHATSAPP_NUMBER 5511999999999 is a placeholder — confirmed via problem statement. Replace with real number before launch.
Suggestion: Consider extracting Hero/Solucao/CtaFinal background image URLs to a constants file for easier asset swapping.

Suggestion: LandingPage.jsx is ~1020 lines with 13+ component definitions in one file. While acceptable for static marketing pages, splitting per-section into /components/sections/ would improve maintainability if more sections are added.
test_credentials: N/A - static landing page, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing landing page. Routes: only '/'. All CTAs are <a> tags pointing to wa.me/5511999999999 (placeholder). No backend/API integration. If WhatsApp number changes, update /app/frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.js (WHATSAPP_NUMBER constant).
